title: Status Column Text Centering
excerpt:

posts.author: alysonpkwy (alyson@parkwayprintshop.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
PLEASE make a setting within the status column specifying how to justify the status text.

Previously, status columns’ text displayed left-justified, with the beginning of the text visible. Recently, it updated to centering the text within the width of the column, much like the display of mirror columns. We use a lot of emojis to signify specific things in our status names, and now they are not visible since they are at the beginning of the text.
